data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding 'One default value per set'.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'One default value per set', but the provided evidence does not include any specific details or examples of default values being defined or utilized. While there are multiple passed steps related to offers and bookings, none of them explicitly demonstrate the existence or configuration of default values as required. This indicates a gap in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence of default values being defined or utilized.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
